mapper.sql:
SELECT ID, CARGO_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME FROM M_HQ_CARGO
AND CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoNameLike}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CARGO_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY_NAME FROM M_HQ_CARGO
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_HQ_CARGO( ID, CARGO_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_HQ_CARGO SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
